changeShortcutsDesc.message: You can change keyboard shortcuts from Chrome's shortcut settings page. Copy the URL below and paste it into your address bar:

advancedCtrlTabDesc.message: Some shortcuts like Ctrl+Tab and Ctrl+P (Cmd+P) are reserved by Chrome and cannot be assigned from the normal settings page. However, you can override them using Chrome DevTools.

advancedCtrlTabStep1.message: Open chrome://extensions and click "Keyboard shortcuts" in the top-left corner

advancedCtrlTabStep3.message: Paste the code below into the Console and press Enter

advancedCtrlTabTradeoff.message: Note: You will lose the default behavior of overridden shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+Tab for next tab, Ctrl+P for print). Use $ALTERNATIVE$ for tab navigation instead.
